title: Incorrect xfer optimization with INTERGER PRIMARY KEY ON CONFLICT REPLACE
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'A', 10.5) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, value = EXCLUDED.value;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'B', 20.5) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, value = EXCLUDED.value;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value > 15.0);
key_bug_features: INTERGER PRIMARY KEY ON CONFLICT REPLACE optimization issue
